name: aether
description: Marketplace for aether-core — belief substrate for AI agents. The model is the mouth, the substrate is the self.

plugins.name: aether-core
plugins.description: Belief substrate for AI agents — persistent, contradiction-aware trust state that outlives any single model. Auto-ingest hook captures facts every turn; aether_sanction gates risky actions; aether_fidelity grades drafts against substrate grounding.
